title: <div>The team of writer’s will all receive credit on the concept of the season a
content:
The team of writer’s will all receive credit on the concept of the season as a whole. The complete written episodes will be credited to the actual person putting pen to paper (or finger to key) as ‘Written by.’

I will be the head writer; what this means is that I will be running the theoretical show—all ideas pass through me—and I will be credited as ‘Created by.’ I intend on writing a majority of the episodes myself in order to maintain a cohesive voice/tone.

But I need you guys! There is no way a show as complicated as LOST could have been written by one person, and while I might be doing the actual writing myself, the mastermind group will be the wood the fuels the creative fire.

Some quick reading:
http://www.scriptmag.com/features/writers-room-101-first-writers-room
http://www.scriptmag.com/tv/tv-writers-room/

Tentative Schedule:

Sessions 1-3: Generative - Character Building - Basic Plot Structures

Sessions 3-10: Writing/Critquing

Session 11-12: Finishing Touches / Professionalization
context: From document: FAU MFA Writer’s Room — chunk 3 (chunk 3/5)
